title: One to five
pedagogy: Vocabulary: หนึ่ง (ห-nam น: high + mai ek → low), สอง (high ส + live ง → rising), สาม (high ส + live ม → rising), สี่ (high ส + mai ek → low), ห้า (high ห + mai tho → falling — here ห is the sounded initial, not a leader). si_set drills สี่ (low) against สี color (rising).

exercises.title: Numbers are tone practice in disguise
body: Thai has its own digits — ๑ ๒ ๓ ๔ ๕ — alive on banknotes, temple signs, and (usefully) the cheaper “Thai price” menus.
The first five numbers use four different tones. Learn them well and your ears get a free tone workout.
And 555? That's ห้าห้าห้า — hâ hâ hâ. It's how Thais laugh online.
